name: Please Build
description: High-performance polyglot build system inspired by Bazel and Buck, written in Go. Supports hermetic builds, remote caching, and incremental compilation for Go, Python, Java, and more.

seo.title: Please Build — Monorepo & Build Systems
seo.meta_description: Please Build: High-performance polyglot build system inspired by Bazel and Buck, written in Go. Supports hermetic builds, remote caching, and incremental compil

when_to_use: Hermetic incremental builds for Go, Python, and Java
Remote build caching shared across team and CI
Polyglot monorepo builds with fine-grained targets
Bazel-inspired build system with simpler configuration

pros: Bazel-like hermetic builds with simpler setup
Polyglot: Go, Python, Java, JS, and more
Remote caching and incremental builds supported
cons: Community much smaller than Bazel or Buck2
Ecosystem of rules is limited versus Bazel
Docs and learning resources are thinner
review.verdict: Solid idea and ergonomics, but the ecosystem gap vs Bazel makes it a risky bet for big monorepos in 2026.
review.best_for: Mid-size polyglot teams wanting Bazel ideas with less ceremony
review.not_for: Large orgs needing the deepest rule ecosystem and community

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
